segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from one of his companions, from Abu Hafs Al Abbar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘it is upon you with (eating) the lettuce, for it cleans the blood’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from one of his companions, from Abu Hafs Al Abbar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘it is upon you with (eating) the lettuce, for it cleans the blood’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘ Abd Allah from his father from certain persons of his people from abu Hafs ibn al-Abbar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must eat lettuce because it cleanses blood.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘ Abd Allah from his father from certain persons of his people from abu Hafs ibn al-Abbar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must eat lettuce because it cleanses blood.’”

gradings.label: مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/211)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبِي حَفْصٍ الْأَبَّارِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
